mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate held near zero signals maximal monetary accommodation, lowering the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows and supporting risk asset valuations over the next month regardless of other conditions.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 0.08 percent as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d returns falls below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or returns are not significantly higher than unconditional baseline (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate crosses above a 10 percent threshold, it signals acute labor market stress that depresses consumer spending expectations and corporate earnings outlooks, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following week.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE at 11.1 percent as of t-1mo
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 in rolling 2-year windows following the threshold breach.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous contraction in housing starts and deceleration in retail sales indicates a joint weakening of durable and non-durable consumer demand that is not visible from either series alone, foreshadowing broad-based earnings downgrades and negative equity returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Joint HOUST/RSAFS decline is followed by positive 60-day forward returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the interaction term adds no incremental Rank IC over either series alone.

mechanism_narrative: During a late-cycle expansion, a deceleration in industrial production growth signals the exhaustion of supply-side capacity expansion and an approaching output slowdown, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month, whereas the same deceleration during early recovery is benign.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO YoY growth decelerates for 3 consecutive months
failure_condition: The negative return effect of INDPRO deceleration is not statistically distinguishable between late-cycle and early-cycle regimes (interaction test p > 0.10), or Rank IC < 0.03 in late-cycle subsample.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained positive month-over-month growth in nonfarm payrolls reflects an expanding labor income base that supports aggregate consumption and corporate revenue growth, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 137802.0 thousand as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS trailing growth and forward 60-day returns is below 0.03 over any rolling 3-year window, or positive PAYEMS growth periods do not outperform negative growth periods (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate is held near zero while CPI inflation simultaneously accelerates above a moderate threshold, markets price rising stagflation risk and anticipate future policy tightening, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following month.
failure_condition: SPX forward 20-day returns during joint low-rate high-inflation triggers are positive in more than 55% of instances, or the interaction effect is not significant beyond the additive effect of each series (p > 0.10).

mechanism_narrative: Rising retail sales reflect strengthening consumer demand momentum that feeds directly into near-term corporate revenue expectations, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the following trading week.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 485545.0 million as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Rank IC between RSAFS month-over-month growth and forward 5-day returns is below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous decline in industrial production and nonfarm payrolls indicates a broad-based contraction spanning both output and labor input, signaling recession onset and driving negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter beyond what either indicator predicts alone.
failure_condition: Joint INDPRO/PAYEMS decline is followed by positive 60-day forward returns in more than 55% of triggered instances, or the joint-trigger Rank IC does not exceed the maximum of the single-series Rank ICs.
